'''Gheeta''' was once in charge of the design of the terminal and diplomatic reception site on [[Circumtore/Legends|Circumtore]], and was high up in the [[Shell Hutts|Shell Hutt]] hierarchy. After a bungled attempt to have [[Emd Grahvess]] killed he was demoted to a negotiator. Grahvess had been saved by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]].

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later when Boba Fett returned, Gheeta went crazy in rage and attempted to have him, his [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] team, and the rest of the Shell Hutts killed. In the ensuing [[Battle of Circumtore|battle]], he was killed and Boba Fett escaped.
